mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation (conv_id, user_id, title, message_count, created_at, last_active_at) VALUES (#{convId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{messageCount}, #{createdAt}, #{lastActiveAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE conv_id = #{convId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_active_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_conversation SET title = #{title} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE ai_conversation SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE conv_id = #{convId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE ai_conversation SET user_id = #{realUserId}, claim_status = 'claimed' WHERE user_id = #{anonymousUserId} AND claim_status = 'anonymous' AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation WHERE user_id = 0 AND claim_status = 'anonymous' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_active_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
